_meta.description: Global template defaults and shared copy. Template merges meta + trades[t] + cities[c] to render each page.

title_pattern: {trade} Answering Service in {city} — Never Miss a Call Again
meta_description_pattern: RingByRing answers your {city} {trade} calls 24/7 — after hours, weekends, and overflow. Never send another caller to voicemail. $149/mo, $0 setup, live in 15 minutes.

demo_cta.label: Call RingByRing now and hear it answer
demo_cta.subtext: 30 seconds. Hear exactly what your callers would hear.

how_it_works.title: Forward your number
how_it_works.body: Set your existing business line to forward to RingByRing when you can't pick up — after hours, when you're busy, or always. Takes a few minutes.

how_it_works.title: RingByRing answers
how_it_works.body: Callers reach a natural, professional voice that knows your business, instead of voicemail.

how_it_works.title: You get the lead
how_it_works.body: RingByRing captures the caller's details and sends them straight to you, so you never lose a job to a missed call.

global_positioning_line: Gap coverage, not replacement. RingByRing catches the calls your team can't — after hours, weekends, and overflow.
footer_disclaimers: Pricing and availability current as of 2026.

style_rules.cta_repeat: Demo call CTA appears at top (hero) and again near pricing.

launch_recommendation.scale_rule: Expand only trades/cities that show Search Console impressions or ad conversions. Signal first, scale second.
